evidence_spans.span: 周报口径被误读，报表页插定义栏；刷新时间不明，标题区嵌更新时间框；导出列缺义，字段表并入释义格；今天环比数被问，请在图表下放口径字段。
管理层十分钟后看；先把图表下的字段放掉。

abstain_reason: No prior repair history showing failed patches and recurrence; the conversation contains a bundled set of requested UI clarifications followed by one urgent local request, not an N+1 request after at least three prior same-means repairs.
